description: Synthetic bilingual (EN/ZH) precision/recall fixture for the Memory River CRAG reranker. Pure fiction; no real persons or systems. Unlike the retrieval fixture, every query plants deliberate DISTRACTORS — memories that share entities, keywords, or domain with the query and therefore pass RRF similarity, but do NOT answer it (wrong attribute, superseded fact, topic-adjacent, or lexical homonym). A good CRAG filter must keep relevantIds and drop distractorIds. neutralFiller memories pad the corpus so the pool is not trivially small.

memories.text: The Halcyon API gateway listens on port 9000 for inbound client traffic.
The Halcyon metrics exporter is scraped on port 9100 by the monitoring stack.
The Halcyon API gateway rotates its TLS certificates automatically every 7 days.
Halcyon deployments are rolled out region by region during the Tuesday maintenance window.
Mira moved to Kyoto in March and has been living there ever since.
Before the move, Mira lived in Osaka for almost six years.
Mira's younger sister Sora lives in Sapporo and works as a vet.
Mira prefers tea over coffee and never drinks anything caffeinated after noon.
The warehouse door release code for the north entrance is 4471.
The fire-drill assembly point is in car park 4471, the lot behind block C.
The warehouse alarm panel PIN for the south entrance is 8820.
客戶星辰科技的當月應收帳款餘額是新台幣 132,000 元。
客戶星辰科技上個月的應收帳款餘額是新台幣 98,000 元,已全數結清。
客戶銀河貿易的當月應收帳款餘額是新台幣 132,000 元。
星辰科技的聯絡窗口是林經理,分機 218。
The almond sponge cake bakes at 170°C for 25 minutes.
The almond brittle is cooked at 150°C until the caramel turns deep amber.
The sponge cake recipe was updated last week: it now bakes at 160°C for 30 minutes.
The office plants are watered every Monday and Thursday morning.
週五的團隊午餐固定在一樓的拉麵店。
The quarterly all-hands is streamed from the Lisbon office.
The spare projector remote is kept in the second drawer of the AV cabinet.
登山社的裝備借用需提前三天在表單上登記。

queries.query: Which port does the Halcyon API gateway accept inbound client traffic on?
queries.note: m02 = same project, different service+port; m03 = same subject, wrong attribute (cert rotation).
m06 = stale prior residence (contradicted by m05); m07 = adjacent person (sister).

queries.query: What is the door release code for the warehouse north entrance?
queries.note: m10 = same digits 4471 but it is a car-park label, not a code; m11 = warehouse code but for the wrong entrance.

queries.query: 星辰科技這個月的應收帳款是多少?
queries.note: m13 = 同客戶但上個月(已結清,過時);m14 = 相同金額但不同客戶。

queries.query: What temperature and time should I use to bake the almond sponge cake?
queries.note: m16 = the OLD sponge-cake setting, superseded by m18; m17 = same domain, different dish (brittle).

queries.query: 星辰科技的聯絡窗口是誰?
queries.note: m12/m14 = 同領域帳款數字,含星辰/相同金額關鍵字但答的是金額不是窗口。
